recommendations.title: Mixed by Erry
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of the pirate mixtape empire of three brothers from Naples, Italy, during the '80s.

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want
recommendations.overview: A university researcher is fired because of the cuts to university. To earn a living he decides to produce drugs recruiting his former colleagues, who despite their skills are living at the margins of society.

recommendations.title: Descendants 2
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, TV Movie, Adventure, Music
recommendations.overview: When the pressure to be royal becomes too much for Mal, she returns to the Isle of the Lost where her archenemy Uma, Ursula's daughter, has taken her spot as self-proclaimed queen.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Project A
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century Hong Kong, the British may rule the land, but the pirates rule the waters. Coast Guard officer Dragon Ma is determined that his beloved Coast Guard will not be made a fool of.

recommendations.title: Moana 2

recommendations.title: The Burning Sea
recommendations.overview: An oil platform dramatically goes down on the Norwegian coast, and researchers try to find out what happened when they realize this is just the start of something even more serious.
